# enabled

**Instance Property**

A Boolean value that indicates whether calculations should be performed on this light.

## Declaration

```swift
var enabled: GLboolean { get set }
```

## Discussion

If the value of [doc://com.apple.glkit/documentation/GLKit/GLKEffectPropertyLight/enabled] is `GL_TRUE`, then lighting calculations are performed for this light. If the value is `GL_FALSE`, this light is skipped when computing the fragment color.

## Configuring Common Lighting Properties

- **position**: The position of the light in world coordinates.
- **transform**: A transform applied to the light’s position and direction before calculating the contribution of the light.
